top_critical_high: SEC-003 Critical: unsandboxed in-process Python plugins run with host permissions.
SEC-001 High: Linux hotplug uses std::stoul on untrusted udev sysattrs without error handling.
COD-002 High: HotplugMonitor callback assignment races with worker-thread callback reads.
COD-003 High: HidTransport stats are mutated/read without synchronization across I/O paths.
SEC-014 High: release workflow publishes unsigned artifacts without checksums, attestation, or provenance.
p0_prs: Harden HotplugMonitor parsing and callback synchronization.
Remove unsafe plugin import paths and add a temporary unsigned-plugin gate/warning before full sandboxing.
Reject oversized image/macro/mouse payloads and validate protocol length fields.
Make clang-tidy and sanitizer CI gating by fixing the missing dev preset and removing || true.
Add release checksums/signing/provenance for stable and nightly artifacts.
